---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: 'feat(scope): brief description'
labels: enhancement
---

## Overview

<!-- 2-3 sentences describing what you want and why. -->

## Problem Statement

<!-- What problem does this solve? Why is it needed now? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- High-level approach. Reference existing code paths where helpful. -->

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Specific, testable criterion 1
- [ ] Specific, testable criterion 2
- [ ] Tests pass with adequate coverage
- [ ] Documentation updated if user-facing

## Out of Scope

<!-- What this issue explicitly does NOT include. -->

## Roadmap Metadata (optional — delete this section if not applicable)

If this issue has triggers, dependents, or an epic parent, copy the
block below to the bottom of the issue body and populate the relevant
fields. Bug fixes and most enhancements have no applicable fields —
delete this entire section in that case. Absent block means "no
metadata, always eligible" for `/roadmap sync` promotion.

See [`CONTEXT.md` → Roadmap Sync Behavior →
`roadmap-meta` issue-body convention][meta-spec] for field semantics.

```html
<!-- roadmap-meta
trigger: <free-form description if blocked on external condition>
trigger-pending: <YYYY-MM-DD | event-name | upstream-flag-name>
unblocks: <comma-separated issue numbers this would unblock>
epic-parent: <single issue number if this is an epic child>
-->
```

[meta-spec]: https://github.com/rshade/gh-aw-fleet/blob/main/CONTEXT.md#roadmap-meta-issue-body-convention
